subject: feat(debug): add install prompt and detected browser diagnostics
body:
The debug panel now shows two additional checks:
- "Install Prompt" — whether beforeinstallprompt was captured and the
  install button is visible. Shows a warning when the event was expected
  but not captured, making the race condition diagnosable without devtools.
- "Detected Browser" — what detectBrowser() resolved to, useful since
  Brave on Android reports as Chrome in the user agent string.

canInstall state is passed from App.tsx to DebugBanner as a prop so the
diagnostics can reflect the live install prompt state.

Tags: pwa, debug, diagnostics, install
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa-install
Semver: minor

title: add install prompt and detected browser diagnostics
